message.content:
You are designing an implementation plan for adding 4 major features to an Electron-based multilingual video learning app (D:\learn). 

## Current Architecture
- Electron app with main.js (backend/IPC), renderer.js (frontend logic), index.html (UI), styles.css (styling)
- Has: video download (yt-dlp), subtitle sync, clickable words with dictionary lookup, AI analysis (6 providers), dictation mode, 14 languages, ECDICT SQLite DB, funasr speech-to-text, glass-morphism UI with aurora/song/system themes
- AI config currently uses Zhipu (智谱清言) provider
- Uses better-sqlite3 for local dictionary
- Has word popup and inline word panel already
- Web Speech API for TTS already integrated

## 4 New Features Required

### Feature 1: 单词收藏本 (Word Favorites/Vocabulary Book)
- When user clicks a word in subtitles, allow them to "收藏" (favorite) it
- Vocabulary book displayed as beautiful cards
- Store in SQLite
- Add favorite button to existing word popup and inline panel
- Add vocabulary book panel to browse saved words

### Feature 2: 批量单词成图 (Batch Word-to-Image Generation)
- Import word lists into vocabulary book
- Group similar words (5-20 per group) onto one image
- Related words generate a scene image together
- Use HTML/Canvas to render visual word cards exportable as images

### Feature 3: 智能语音助手 (Smart Voice Assistant)
- Upload documents to voice assistant
- Assistant "lectures" the content using AI + TTS
- Use existing AI providers for summarization + Web Speech API for reading

### Feature 4: 跨国法规库 (International Law/Regulation Library)
- Regulations library for multiple countries
- Support reading aloud
- Built-in JSON data with sample regulations per language

## Design Requirements
- Minimal code, follow existing patterns
- Use existing infrastructure: SQLite, AI providers, TTS, themes
- Glass-morphism style matching existing UI
- Chinese UI labels

Please provide a detailed implementation plan with:
1. Database schema (SQLite tables needed)
2. HTML additions per feature
3. CSS additions per feature
4. renderer.js functions per feature
5. main.js IPC handlers per feature
6. Implementation order and dependencies

content.text: I'll start by thoroughly exploring the existing codebase to understand the architecture, patterns, and conventions before designing the implementation plan.
